sheet_name: แปลนไฟฟ้าแสงสว่าง ชั้นล่าง
view_title: แปลนไฟฟ้าแสงสว่าง ชั้นล่าง
grid_source: บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า00_gridline.json
rooms_shown: เตรียมอาหาร

elements.description: แผงเมนสวิตช์ (LP), +1.80M, located near the จอดรถ/พักผ่อน boundary wall
Feed 2-2.5 NYY-Ø25mm.PVC from LP panel down through the slab/wall to a weatherproof bell switch (SB) near the เฉลียง entrance, feeding circuit 1/LP

Circled-cross downlight symbols scattered through the plan, individually lettered (letters observed include g, h in นอน 1; f, d near นอน 2/ซักล้าง; k in ซักล้าง; c, d, e cluster near เตรียมอาหาร; b, b in พักผ่อน; d near เฉลียง) tying each fixture to a switch loop
elements.grid_ref: นอน 1 (~2 points), นอน 2 (~1-2 points), ซักล้าง (1 point), เตรียมอาหาร (1-2 points), พักผ่อน (2 points), เฉลียง (1 point)

elements.description: A short bold linear (LED-tube-style) symbol near เตรียมอาหาร/จอดรถ, distinct from the circled downlight points
Small dot symbols near room entrances presumed to be one-way wall switches, plus the SB weatherproof bell switch near เฉลียง/main entrance

warnings: GRID DISAGREEMENT WITH t1: t1's independent read set grid_ref_is_free_text_not_grid_notation: true for this page. My independent read finds the printed dimension string (1.30+7.00(4.00+3.00)+1.30 horizontally; 1.50+4.00+9.50-bracket(2.00+3.50)+1.50+3.00-bracket(1.50+1.50) vertically) matches the real building grid master (หน้า00_gridline.json) exactly, including the dummy grid extensions A'/A'' below grid A -- same evidence and conclusion as noted on หน้า29_floor_plan.json. Recommend grid_source-linked treatment rather than free-text.

This sheet is a symbol-routing plan, not a quantity/fixture-count schedule -- the exact letter-to-fixture correspondence (which lowercase letter switch loop controls which downlight) is difficult to resolve precisely at this image resolution and is not being asserted as a verified count. Do not infer a bill-of-quantities fixture count from this file without zooming in on the source drawing.
Fixture types themselves (downlight vs LED tube spec) are defined on the EE-01 symbol legend, not repeated here.
